description_long: This object consists of a matching set of a two-seater sofa and a single armchair, both upholstered in a vibrant red material with a subtle sheen. The seats and backrests are generously padded and feature a tufted design, giving a plush and inviting appearance. The armrests are wide, slightly flared, and padded, providing comfort and a modern aesthetic. Both pieces rest on sturdy, block-style wooden legs with a natural finish, contrasting with the bold upholstery. The backrests are continuous and slightly curved, offering ergonomic support. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on comfort, making it suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or public lounges.
description: A modern red sofa and armchair set with tufted cushions, wide padded armrests, and block wooden legs, exuding comfort and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted seat and back cushions, wide padded armrests, and the full face of both the sofa and armchair.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the seats, the thickness of the cushions, and the side profile of the armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous backrests and the wooden legs, with the armchair positioned to show its side.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the sofa's length, the armchair's backrest, and the blocky wooden legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two back cushions on the sofa, one seat and one back cushion on the armchair; all cushions are attached, uniform in size per piece, and feature a tufted pattern.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests with a slightly flared profile, extending from the seat to the backrest, matching the upholstery and height of the seat.
attribute_leg_design: Four block-style wooden legs per piece, positioned at the corners, exposed with a natural wood finish, providing sturdy support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrests with a gentle curve, fully upholstered and featuring attached tufted cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red upholstery with a tufted texture on the seat and back cushions, creating a quilted visual effect.
